name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new failure mode, material model improvement, UI feature, or integration
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the gap. "I want X" is less useful than "When I do Y, I can't Z because..." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Physics / implementation notes (if applicable)

<!-- If this involves a new material model, failure criterion, or calibration method:
- What constants does it need?
- Do you have a citation for the model?
- What confidence level is appropriate (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) given available FDM data? -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other approaches, workarounds, or tools that partially solve this -->

## Is this for a specific FTC application?

<!-- Optional: describing the robot mechanism or loading scenario helps prioritize. -->
